input.note: instant == edge (tape-loading.md TAPE-INSTANT-EQUIV-001): a short DATA block (flag 0xFF) is loaded BOTH by the instant/trap loader (no ROM, no pulses, tStates 0) AND by the real ROM LD-BYTES edge-load (0x0556) over the W10.9 pulse stream; the two must agree on the observable result {ok, bytesLoaded, RAM} and both equal the source bytes. Same 24-byte data as TAPE-EDGE-LOAD-001 so the parallel is exact. The edge half is ~7.5M T; budget 12,000,000 bounds it. Fabrication-free: expected.ram IS the source bytes.

instant == edge for a HEADER flag (0x00 < 0x80 -> the 8063-pilot leader on the edge half), exercising the pilot-by-flag path of the real ROM against the flag-independent instant trap. 8 source data bytes -> body [0x00, ...data, checksum]. The edge half is ~17.6M T; budget 25,000,000.
